field_descriptions.period_days: Number of days to look back (1-365, default: 30). Ignored if start_date is provided.
field_descriptions.tenant_ids: Optional filter for specific tenant UUIDs. If omitted, returns all accessible tenants.
field_descriptions.start_date: Optional explicit start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Takes precedence over period_days.
field_descriptions.end_date: Optional explicit end date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if not provided.

default.description: Default 30-day summary for all accessible tenants

specific_period.description: Query for a specific date range
